sections.title: If the player is not disguised

lines.speaker: Varrian Sobak
lines.text: Human! Get back to the slave pens before I call the guards!

lines.speaker: Varrian Sobak
lines.text: Now you look like a vyre in need of some new threads.

lines.speaker: Varrian Sobak
lines.text: Oh yes. And luckily for you, I have everything you could ever need. Clothes, or the materials to make them if that's more your thing. All pre-scented as well.

lines.speaker: Varrian Sobak
lines.text: Oh don't go acting like you don't know what I mean. You've done a decent job, but behind that scent, I can tell you're just a lowly vyre.

lines.speaker: Varrian Sobak
lines.text: Fear not, I am no judge. I know that there are many like you who want a taste of upper class life. That's why all my outfits are scented. Helps you fit right in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Does it not bother you having lower class vampyres up here?

lines.speaker: Varrian Sobak
lines.text: Me? No. As long as you've got money, I don't care who you are.

lines.speaker: Varrian Sobak
lines.text: So, want to take a look?

lines.speaker: Varrian Sobak
lines.text: I'll be here if you change your mind.
